title: phyllanthus hortensis
intro: Phyllanthus hortensis, also known as the green gland, is a small, annual herb that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae and is native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating liver and kidney disorders, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus hortensis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
